texto: There should be no separation between spontaneous work with an emotional tone and work directed by the intellect. Both are supplementary to each other and must be regarded as intimately connected. Discipline and freedom are thus to be seen as elements of equal weight, each partaking of the other.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Armin Hofmann sobre temas ligados a trabalho. A afirmação “There should be no separation between spontaneous work with an emotional tone and work directed b…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a trabalho, vida, work, útil em momentos de trabalho e work.

frase_original: There should be no separation between spontaneous work with an emotional tone and work directed by the intellect. Both are supplementary to each other and must be regarded as intimately connected. Discipline and freedom are thus to be seen as elements of equal weight, each partaking of the other.
